Class ModelDiscussionForum

java.lang.Object
guiDiscussionForum.ModelDiscussionForum
public class ModelDiscussionForum extends Object

Title: ModelDiscussionForum Class

Description: This class serves as the Model layer for the Discussion Forum in the MVC architecture. It handles all CRUD operations for both Post and Reply objects, interacting with the postDB and replyDB tables of the H2 database. The shared database connection is accessed via the static reference from FoundationsMain, keeping all connection management centralized in the Database class.

  • Field Details

    • theDatabase

      private static database.Database theDatabase
      Attributes

  • Constructor Details

    • ModelDiscussionForum

      public ModelDiscussionForum()

      Constructor: ModelDiscussionForum()

      Description: Default constructor. The database connection is accessed via the shared static database reference from FoundationsMain.

  • Method Details

    • addPost

      public boolean addPost(entityClasses.Post post)

      Method: addPost(Post post)

      Description: Inserts a new Post object into the postDB table. Validates the post before attempting insertion and returns false with a printed error if validation fails. On successful insert, the database-generated postID is retrieved and stamped back onto the Post object.

      Parameters:
      post - the Post object to insert into the database
      Returns:
      true if the post was successfully inserted, false otherwise

    • getAuthorList

      public List<Integer> getAuthorList(String username)

      Method: getAuthorList(string username)

      Description: Retrieves a list of integer ids for each user by a username.

      Parameters:
      username - the the username of the author to get
      Returns:
      a post object of desired post, or null if an error occurs.

    • getPostByID

      public entityClasses.Post getPostByID(int id)

      Method: getPostByID(int id)

      Description: Retrieves post matching the desired id and returns the post object.

      Parameters:
      id - the ID of the post to grab.
      Returns:
      a post object of desired post, or null if an error occurs.

    • getAllPosts

      public List<entityClasses.Post> getAllPosts(List<Constraint> constraints)

      Method: getAllPosts()

      Description: Retrieves all posts from the postDB table and returns them as a list of Post objects.

      Parameters:
      constraints - is a list of arguments to add to the query

      In addition, the method can take a list of constraints. But that list CANNOT use integers, it must be strings.

      Returns:
      a List of all Post objects in the database, or null if an error occurs and if there is a filter for the posts, will only return the posts that pass the filter.

    • updatePost

      public boolean updatePost(entityClasses.Post post)

      Method: updatePost(Post post)

      Description: Updates the content and category of an existing post in the postDB table. Matches the record by postID. Validates the post before attempting the update.

      Parameters:
      post - the Post object containing the updated values and the postID to match
      Returns:
      true if the update was successful, false otherwise

    • authorHasStudentRole

      public boolean authorHasStudentRole(int authorId)

      Method: authorHasStudentRole(String authorUserName)

      Description: Returns true when the given userID exists in userDB and has the Student role.

      Parameters:
      authorID - post author ID
      Returns:
      true if the user is a student

    • savePostGrade

      public boolean savePostGrade(int postID, EvaluationTool.EvaluationRow row)

      Method: savePostGrade(int postID, EvaluationRow row)

      Description: saves the computed grade fields to the selected post row.

      Parameters:
      postID - post identifier to update
      row - computed grade result
      Returns:
      true when updated, false otherwise

    • savePostGradeManual

      public boolean savePostGradeManual(int postID, int numberGrade)

      Method: savePostGradeManual(int postID, int numberGrade)

      Description: Staff override for an existing graded student post. sets the numeric grade to 0–100, derives the letter grade, and sets graded true. when the post author does not have the Student role.

      Parameters:
      postID - post identifier
      numberGrade - rounded score 0–100
      Returns:
      true when a row was updated

    • hardDeletePost

      public boolean hardDeletePost(int postID)

      Method: hardDeletePost(int postID)

      Description: Permanently removes a post from the postDB table by its postID. This method is intended for use in testing only. The GUI should use softDeletePost() which marks the post as deleted instead of removing it, allowing replies to remain visible. The "Are you sure?" confirmation is handled by the caller before this method is called.

      Parameters:
      postID - the ID of the post to permanently delete
      Returns:
      true if the deletion was successful, false otherwise

    • softDeletePost

      public boolean softDeletePost(int postID)

      Method: softDeletePost(int postID)

      Description: Soft deletes a post by overwriting its content, title, and author with placeholder deleted values instead of removing the row from the database. This allows any replies attached to the post to remain visible in the GUI, where a message indicating the original post was deleted will be shown. This is the method the GUI should use for deletion. For permanent removal, use hardDeletePost() which is intended for testing only.

      Parameters:
      postID - the ID of the post to soft delete
      Returns:
      true if the soft deletion was successful, false otherwise

    • hidePost

      public boolean hidePost(entityClasses.Post post)

      Method: hidePost(Post post)

      Description: Hides a post by setting the isPostHidden flag to TRUE.

      Parameters:
      post - the post to set to hidden.
      Returns:
      true if the hide was successful, false otherwise

    • unhidePost

      public boolean unhidePost(entityClasses.Post post)

      Method: unhidePost(Post post)

      Description: Unhides a post by setting the isPostHidden flag to FALSE.

      Parameters:
      post - the post to set to not hidden.
      Returns:
      true if the unhide was successful, false otherwise

    • addReply

      public boolean addReply(entityClasses.Reply reply, int id)

      Method: addReply(Reply reply, int id)

      Description: Inserts a new Reply object into the replyDB table. Validates the reply before attempting insertion and returns false with a printed error if validation fails. Verifies that the specified postID exists in the database before inserting. On successful insert, the database-generated replyID and the provided postID are stamped back onto the Reply object.

      Parameters:
      reply - the Reply object to insert into the database
      id - the postID that this reply belongs to
      Returns:
      true if the reply was successfully inserted, false otherwise

    • getReplyByID

      public entityClasses.Reply getReplyByID(int id)

      Method: getPostByID(int id)

      Description: Retrieves post matching the desired id and returns the post object.

      Parameters:
      id - the ID of the post to grab.
      Returns:
      a post object of desired post, or null if an error occurs.

    • getAllReplies

      public List<entityClasses.Reply> getAllReplies()

      Method: getAllReplies()

      Description: Retrieves all replies from the replyDB table.

      Returns:
      a List of all Reply objects in the database, or null if an error occurs

    • getRepliesByPost

      public List<entityClasses.Reply> getRepliesByPost(int postID)

      Method: getRepliesByPost(int postID)

      Description: Retrieves all replies associated with a specific post. Primary method used by the GUI when a user clicks on a post.

      Parameters:
      postID - the ID of the post whose replies should be retrieved
      Returns:
      a List of Reply objects for the given postID, or null if an error occurs

    • getRepliesByPostAndRole

      public List<entityClasses.Reply> getRepliesByPostAndRole(int postID, String role)

      Method: getRepliesByPostAndRole(int postID, String role)

      Description: Retrieves replies for a specific post filtered by author role. Useful for showing only Staff replies on a given post.

      Parameters:
      postID - the ID of the post to filter by
      role - the author role to filter by
      Returns:
      a List of Reply objects matching both postID, or null if an error occurs

    • updateReply

      public boolean updateReply(entityClasses.Reply reply)

      Method: updateReply(Reply reply)

      Description: Updates the content, author, and authorRole of an existing reply in the replyDB table. Matches the record by both postID and replyID. Validates the reply before attempting the update and returns false if validation fails. Also returns false if no matching reply is found in the database.

      Parameters:
      reply - the Reply object containing the updated values, postID, and replyID to match
      Returns:
      true if the update was successful, false otherwise

    • hardDeleteReply

      public boolean hardDeleteReply(int replyID)

      Method: hardDeleteReply(int replyID)

      Description: Permanently removes a post from the postDB table by its postID. This method is intended for use in testing only. The GUI should use softDeletePost() which marks the post as deleted instead of removing it, allowing replies to remain visible. The "Are you sure?" confirmation is handled by the caller before this method is called.

      Parameters:
      postID - the ID of the post to permanently delete
      Returns:
      true if the deletion was successful, false otherwise

    • hideReply

      public boolean hideReply(entityClasses.Reply reply)

      Method: hideReply(Reply reply)

      Description: Hides a reply by setting the isReplyHidden flag to TRUE.

      Parameters:
      reply - the reply to set to hidden.
      Returns:
      true if the hide was successful, false otherwise

    • unhideReply

      public boolean unhideReply(entityClasses.Reply reply)

      Method: unhideReply(Reply reply)

      Description: Unhides a reply by setting the isReplyHidden flag to FALSE.

      Parameters:
      reply - the reply to set to not hidden.
      Returns:
      true if the unhide was successful, false otherwise

    • markPostAsRead

      public boolean markPostAsRead(String userName, int postID)

      Method: markPostAsRead(String userName, int postID)

      Description: Marks a post as read for a specific user by inserting a row into the postReadStatus table. Uses MERGE so duplicate reads do not cause errors. Called when a user clicks on a post in the scroll pane.

      Parameters:
      userName - the username of the user who read the post
      postID - the ID of the post that was read
      Returns:
      true if the operation was successful, false otherwise

    • isPostRead

      public boolean isPostRead(String userName, int postID)

      Method: isPostRead(String userName, int postID)

      Description: Checks whether a specific user has read a specific post by looking for a matching row in the postReadStatus table. The absence of a row means the post is unread. Called when building each post row in the scroll pane.

      Parameters:
      userName - the username of the user to check
      postID - the ID of the post to check
      Returns:
      true if the user has read the post, false otherwise

    • markPostAsUnread

      public boolean markPostAsUnread(int postID, String exceptUserName)

      Method: markPostAsUnread(int postID, String exceptUserName)

      Description: Marks a post as unread for all users except the specified user by deleting their rows from the postReadStatus table. Called when a new reply is added to a post so that all other users are notified of new activity.

      Parameters:
      postID - the ID of the post to mark as unread
      exceptUserName - the username of the user who should remain marked as read
      Returns:
      true if the operation was successful, false otherwise

    • isPostHidden

      public boolean isPostHidden(int postID)

      Method: isPostHidden(int postID)

      Description: Checks whether a post has been marked as hidden and returns the current state.

      Parameters:
      int - postID of the post to check
      Returns:
      true if the post is hidden, false if not

    • isReplyHidden

      public boolean isReplyHidden(int postID, int replyID)

      Method: isReplyHidden(int postID, int replyID)

      Description: Checks whether a post has been marked as hidden and returns the current state.

      Parameters:
      int - postID of the post to check
      Returns:
      true if the post is hidden, false if not

    • buildPostFromResultSet

      private entityClasses.Post buildPostFromResultSet(ResultSet rs) throws SQLException

      Method: buildPostFromResultSet(ResultSet rs)

      Description: Private helper that constructs a Post object from the current row of a ResultSet, avoiding duplicate field mapping code.

      Parameters:
      rs - the ResultSet positioned at the row to convert
      Returns:
      a Post object populated with values from the current row
      Throws:
      SQLException - if any column cannot be retrieved

    • deleteReply

      public boolean deleteReply(int postID, int replyID)

      Method: deleteReply(int postID, int replyID)

      Description: Deletes a specific reply from the replyDB table using its postID and replyID. The "Are you sure?" confirmation is handled by the GUI before this method is called.

      Parameters:
      postID - the ID of the post the reply belongs to
      replyID - the ID of the specific reply to delete
      Returns:
      true if the deletion was successful, false otherwise

    • buildReplyFromResultSet

      private entityClasses.Reply buildReplyFromResultSet(ResultSet rs) throws SQLException

      Method: buildReplyFromResultSet(ResultSet rs)

      Description: Private helper that constructs a Reply object from the current row of a ResultSet, avoiding duplicate field mapping code.

      Parameters:
      rs - the ResultSet positioned at the row to convert
      Returns:
      a Reply object populated with values from the current row
      Throws:
      SQLException - if any column cannot be retrieved
